scripts.dev:web: npm run dev --workspace=@everec/web-backend & npm run dev --workspace=@everec/web-frontend
scripts.dev:knowgo: npm run dev --workspace=@everec/knowgo-backend & npm run dev --workspace=@everec/knowgo-frontend
scripts.dev:prerector: npm run dev --workspace=@everec/prerector-backend & npm run dev --workspace=@everec/prerector-frontend
scripts.build:knowgo: npm run build --workspace=@everec/knowgo-backend && npm run build --workspace=@everec/knowgo-frontend
scripts.build:vercel-knowgo: npm run build:vercel-knowgo-api && npm run build --workspace=@everec/knowgo-frontend
scripts.build:vercel-prerector: npm run build:vercel-prerector-api && npm run build --workspace=@everec/prerector-frontend
